TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qmocyan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 28 buwan, 77 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 72 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qmocyan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Qmocyan hya' ga Blhuy. tay mkyahu' na Qmocyan hya' ga Babau. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qmoʦ~ʨjan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa βlħuj. taj mkjaħuʔ na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa βaβau. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qmocyan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 28 buwan, 77 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 72 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qmocyan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qmocyan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Qmocyan hya' ga Blhuy. tay mkyahu' na Qmocyan hya' ga Babau. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qmoʦ~ʨjan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa βlħuj. taj mkjaħuʔ na qmoʦ~ʨjan ħjaʔ ɣa βaβau. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
